name: The Fidelity State Bank And Trust Company
description_short: Fidelity State Bank & Trust Company is a community bank in Dodge City, Kansas offering deposit accounts, lending, and trust/wealth management services with deep local roots.
description_long: Fidelity State Bank & Trust Company is a Kansas-based community bank headquartered in Dodge City with established local presence and institutional history. The bank positions itself around three core pillars: financial strength, friendly service, and deep community roots in Dodge City. Their marketing emphasizes "Banking, the way it should be," suggesting a customer-focused, relationship-driven approach rather than a transactional model. The bank offers three primary service categories: Banking services including deposit accounts tailored to business and household needs; Lending services covering farm, business, and household financing options; and Trust services including wealth management and investment planning. They provide online banking access and encourage customers to meet with their team to discuss personalized financing solutions. The website indicates they maintain a physical main branch location in downtown Dodge City, currently accessible during streetscape construction. Fidelity differentiates itself through local expertise and community integration. As a regional bank rather than a national chain, they emphasize relationship banking and the ability to meet face-to-face with knowledgeable staff. Their agricultural lending focus (farm financing specifically mentioned) and trust services suggest they serve a more sophisticated customer base than basic retail banking. The "experienced and unbiased team" language in their trust section implies fiduciary-level advisory services. Limitations include limited online information about specific product details, rates, fees, and eligibility requirements. The website provides no transparency on APRs, minimum deposits, or account features. For consumers seeking detailed comparisons or those outside the Dodge City area, the bank's local focus and limited digital presence may be disadvantageous. No mention of FDIC insurance, financial certifications, or third-party ratings is provided on the homepage.
services: Online banking platform with login access
In-person loan consultation and advisory services
pros: Local community bank with deep roots in Dodge City, Kansas since establishment
Offers specialized agricultural/farm lending expertise relevant to rural customers
Comprehensive trust and wealth management services with experienced advisory team
Relationship-based banking model allowing face-to-face meetings with loan officers
Three integrated service lines (banking, lending, trust) under one institution
Online banking platform available for remote account access and management
cons: Minimal online transparency regarding rates, fees, account minimums, or product terms
Geographic limitation as a single-location community bank may disadvantage non-local customers
Limited digital service information suggests less developed online banking capabilities compared to national banks
No publicly displayed certifications, regulatory ratings, or third-party financial strength indicators
Website lacks details on loan approval timelines, eligibility requirements, or specific lending products
best_for: Agricultural and farm business owners seeking specialized rural lending expertise
Dodge City, Kansas residents and nearby communities wanting local relationship banking
Small to mid-sized business owners needing comprehensive lending and cash management services
High-net-worth individuals seeking personalized trust, estate planning, and wealth management
diagnosis: Fidelity State Bank & Trust Company is best for Dodge City-area residents and agricultural business owners seeking personalized, relationship-driven banking with specialized farm lending expertise. The main caveat is that as a small community bank with limited online information, it may not suit consumers seeking transparency on rates, national ATM networks, or advanced digital banking features; prospective customers should visit the branch or call directly for specific product details.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Fidelity State Bank & Trust Company in Dodge City, Kansas offering deposit accounts, lending, and trust/wealth management services.
fdic_official_name: The Fidelity State Bank and Trust Company
